issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated'. This is a passive effect that occurs when the card enters play, not an activated ability.
Duration should be 'Permanent' not 'EndOfTurn'. Rush keyword persists for the lifetime of the character, not just until end of turn.

Condition 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The cost '[DON!! x2]' is a play cost, not an ongoing condition. This should be removed; the cost is handled separately in card metadata, not in the DSL effect condition.
